property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21\bin;C:\Windows\Sun\Java\bin;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Program Files\dotnet;C:\Users\belvinard\Videos\apache-maven-3.9.10\bin;C:\Program Files\IBM\Cloud\bin;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21\bin;C:\Program Files\MongoDB\Server\8.0\bin;C:\Program Files\nodejs;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\IntelliJ IDEA Community Edition 2025.1.3\bin;C:\Program Files\Python313;C:\Program Files\Python313\Scripts;C:\xampp\php;C:\Program Files\7-Zip;C:\xampp\mysql\bin;C:\Program Files\PostgreSQL\17\bin;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Server 8.0\bin;C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\resources\bin;D:\xampp\mysql\bin;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;D:\stockFulll\redis;C:\Program Files\Redis\;C:\Windows\System32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Program Files\dotnet;C:\Users\belvinard\Videos\apache-maven-3.9.10\bin;C:\Program Files\IBM\Cloud\bin;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21\bin;C:\Program Files\MongoDB\Server\8.0\bin;C:\Program Files\nodejs;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\IntelliJ IDEA Community Edition 2025.1.3\bin;C:\Program Files\Python313;C:\Program Files\Python313\Scripts;C:\xampp\php;C:\Program Files\7-Zip;C:\xampp\mysql\bin;C:\Program Files\PostgreSQL\17\bin;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Server 8.0\bin;C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\resources\bin;D:\xampp\mysql\bin;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;D:\stockFulll\redis;C:\Program Files\Redis\;C:\Users\belvinard\AppData\Local\pnpm;c:\Users\belvinard\AppData\Roaming\Code\User\globalStorage\github.copilot-chat\debugCommand;c:\Users\belvinard\AppData\Roaming\Code\User\globalStorage\github.copilot-chat\copilotCli;C:\Program Files\cursor\resources\app\bin;C:\Users\belvinard\AppData\Loca;C:\Users\belvinard\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;.

testcase.name: highestBalanceAmount
testcase.system-err: Mar 17, 2026 7:01:03 AM org.example.CreditUnionLedger register INFO: Registered [0] Jean Pierre Ngono — $1,200,000.00 Mar 17, 2026 7:01:03 AM org.example.CreditUnionLedger register INFO: Registered [1] Brice Kamdem — $125,000.00 Mar 17, 2026 7:01:03 AM org.example.CreditUnionLedger register INFO: Registered [2] Serge Alain Ndzié — $2,140,000.00 Mar 17, 2026 7:01:03 AM org.example.CreditUnionLedger register INFO: Registered [3] Marie Claire Ndzi — $170,000.00

testcase.system-err: Mar 17, 2026 7:01:03 AM org.example.CreditUnionLedger register INFO: Registered [0] Richest — $999,999.00 Mar 17, 2026 7:01:03 AM org.example.CreditUnionLedger register INFO: Registered [1] Second — $500.00
